/usr/bin/g++ -g CMakeFiles/Chess.dir/src/Model.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Chess.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Chess.dir/src/Chess.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Chess.dir/src/Board.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Chess.dir/src/Rook.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Chess.dir/src/Piece.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Chess.dir/src/Knight.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Chess.dir/src/Bishop.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Chess.dir/src/Pawn.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Chess.dir/src/Queen.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Chess.dir/src/King.cpp.o -o Chess
